ddls:
CREATE TABLE "weather_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data record */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the weather station ID */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the weather data */,
  "time_pdt" TEXT /* Time of the weather data in Pacific Daylight Time (PDT) */,
  "air_temp_f" REAL /* Air temperature in degrees Fahrenheit */,
  "dew_point_f" REAL /* Dew point in degrees Fahrenheit */,
  "rel_hum_pct" REAL /* Relative humidity as a percentage */,
  "wind_dir" TEXT /* Wind direction and speed (e.g., NW@3.8) */,
  "wind_speed_mph" REAL /* Wind speed in miles per hour */,
  "wind_gust_mph" REAL /* Wind gust in miles per hour */,
  "tot_prec_in" REAL /* Total precipitation in inches */,
  "solar_rad_w_m2" REAL /* Solar radiation in watts per square meter */,
  "atm_press_inhg" REAL /* Atmospheric pressure in inches of mercury */,
  "download_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data was downloaded */,
  "weather_data_type" TEXT /* Type of weather data (e.g., current, forecast, historical) */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the weather data (e.g., good, fair, poor) */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the weather data (e.g., weather station, satellite, radar) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather station */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the weather station */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the weather station (e.g., Cemetery, The Dalles, Wasco County) */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the weather station */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the weather station */,
  "elevation_ft" REAL /* Elevation of the weather station in feet */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the station */,
  "station_type" TEXT /* Type of weather station (e.g., surface, radar, satellite) */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date the station was installed */,
  "maintenance_interval" INTEGER /* Interval for regular maintenance (in days) */,
  "station_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the station */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., meteorologist, researcher, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed for security) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "failed_login_attempts" INTEGER /* Number of failed login attempts by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather data record being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the weather data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the weather data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent (e.g., browser, operating system) accessing the data */,
  "access_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather condition or event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather data record associated with the condition */,
  "condition_type" TEXT /* Type of weather condition (e.g., thunderstorm, heavy rain) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the weather condition */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the weather condition */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the weather condition */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity of the weather condition (e.g., mild, severe) */,
  "condition_category" TEXT /* Category of the weather condition (e.g., precipitation, wind, temperature) */,
  "condition_severity_level" TEXT /* Severity level of the weather condition (e.g., low, moderate, high) */,
  "condition_impact" TEXT /* Potential impact of the weather condition */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_conditions_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather data record the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the data file (e.g., CSV, JSON, XML) */,
  "file_compression" TEXT /* Compression type of the data file (e.g., zip, gzip) */,
  "file_encrypt" INTEGER /* Whether the file is encrypted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("data_id")
)
